passes.title: American Heritage Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Digital pass admits up to 4 visitors at half-price admission. General admission rates are $24.00 per person. Infants under one year old are free.
Online timed-tickets must be purchased in advance at the Children’s Museum website. Be sure to reserve “Half Price Library Timed Tickets” under the “Discount Programs” section at www.bostonchildrensmuseum.org/ticketing. Upon arrival at the museum, you will have to show your tickets and library pass for admission. The date on the pass must match the date of your visit.
You may print the attached pass at home, display it on your smartphone, or pick up a printed copy at the library.
*Please note that the Boston Children's Museum's hours are subject to change. Please check the official website for all updates:  bostonchildrensmuseum.org .
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass provides a 50% off discount on Boston Harbor Island Ferry tickets for up to 4 people.
This pass is a digital discount code. You will receive the code via email after reserving this pass. You will submit the discount code when purchasing tickets online at www.bostonharborislands.org .
The discount code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below:
Georges Island
May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays
June 16 - September 1: every day

The discount code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below:
Georges Island
May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays
June 16 - September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
July 15 - September 1: every day
September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays
September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays
Peddocks Island from Hingham
June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays
September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
This coupon pass admits one visitor to The Butterfly Place free of charge.
This coupon pass must be picked up at the Billerica Public Library and brought to the Butterfly Place in order to receive the free admission. You do not have to return this pass.
Regular admission rates for The Butterfly Place are $15.00 for adults, $13.00 for seniors, and $11.00 for children. Children under the age of 2 are admitted free.  
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.

passes.title: The Butterfly Place
passes.benefit_text:
This is a coupon pass that must be picked up at the library. The pass admits up to 6 guests to Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze at the gate with a savings of $10 off per ticket.
Library patrons should use the coupon to purchase discounted tickets at Davis Farmland admissions on the day of their visit. Tickets purchased online are not eligible for the discount.
Adults must be accompanied by at least one child 12 or younger when visiting Davis Farmland.
Pass is not valid on Monday holidays, with packages, special events, night events, or other discounts.
Both Davis Farmland and Mega Maze are open weather permitting. Weather decisions are made daily by 8am and posted on the Davis Farmland website  and the phone message system (978-422-6666).
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.

passes.title: Davis Farmland
passes.benefit_text:
This digital pass admits three (3) people at half price. Additional people in your party pay the regular admission price: Adult: $19.00 ; Senior (60+): $18.00 ; Child: $19.00 ; Under 1 year old: Free ; Teachers are always free!
All discounts (including the library pass) are applied on arrival. See Discovery Museum website for most up to date information.
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
source_phrases: Digital pass provides $5.00 off general admission for up to 4 visitors.
Regular admission prices are $22.00 for adults, $20 for seniors, $15 for college students with current ID; free for anyone under 18 or anyone named "Isabella".
Reserve the pass, and you will receive an email containing an online promo code along with instructions on how to receive the discount and plan your visit.
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
The library card acts as your pass. There is no pass to reserve. Show your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the admissions desk of the John F. Kennedy Library to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and each visitor must present their own Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission.
JOHN F. KENNEDY PRESIDENTIAL LIBRARY AND MUSEUM
www.jfklibrary.org | 617.514.1600
Open 10:00 am-5:00 pm, last admission at 3:30 pm

JOHN F. KENNEDY PRESIDENTIAL LIBRARY AND MUSEUM
www.jfklibrary.org | 617.514.1600
Open 10:00 am-5:00 pm, last admission at 3:30 pm

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
source_phrases: This digital pass is valid for up to four people at one time (adults, seniors or children age two or older; children under two are admitted free) at any Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. Each person will be charged a $2.00 admission fee.

There are over sixty beautiful sanctuaries located across Massachusetts. Please see the full listing of wildlife sanctuaries at the official Mass Audubon website by clicking this link:  massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/our-wildlife-sanctuaries .
Without the library pass discount the regular admission cost for the popular Drumlin Farm location is $9 for adults and $6 for children 2-12 and seniors (65+).
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Digital discount code allows admission for 2 adults at $10 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to four children ages 7-17 at $10 dollars each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7-17 years old for general admission, which is $10. Children 6 and under are admitted free.
Pass does not allow for discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or events.
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This digital pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% off discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are always admitted free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date that is  printed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass (printed or displayed on a phone) with you to the Museum of Science.
When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00am – 5:00pm daily).
If you are unable to show the pass on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
BILLERICA PUBLIC LIBRARY
This digital pass allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this pass in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit www.neaq.org/visit/offers-and-discounts for details.
source_phrases: BILLERICA PUBLIC LIBRARY
This digital pass allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this pass in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit www.neaq.org/visit/offers-and-discounts for details.
Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
Valid only for Aquarium admission.
This pass does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
Hours of operation are subject to change.
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
source_phrases: Pass admits 2 guests at half price. Weekday admission rates are $20 for adults, $17 for seniors, $10 for children 4-12, free for members and children under 3. Weekend admission rates are $21 for adults, $18 for seniors, $11 for children 4-12, free for members and children under 3. Dogs are admitted at a rate of $8 per canine each day of the week.

Online pre-reservations are not required but you may book tickets ahead of time at nebg.org  by inputting promo code LIBDI during checkout. The physical pass must still be brought to the New England Botanic Garden in order to receive the discount.
Pass cannot be applied to special events.

This physical pass may be picked up at the circulation desk no earlier than the day before use. This pass must be returned to the Billerica Public Library by 9am the next day. The pass may be returned to the outside drop box during off hours.
This pass was generously donated by the Billerica Garden Club.

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
passes.benefit_text:
Admits two (2) adults at $12.00 per person for general admission.
Regular admission rates are $25 for adults, $23 for seniors (age 65+), and $15 for students; children under 16 and all residents of Salem, MA are admitted free. 
Reserve the pass and you will automatically receive an email containing a unique promo code. Enter the code while purchasing tickets on the Peabody Essex Museum website.
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.
source_phrases: Admits two (2) adults at $12.00 per person for general admission.

Reserve the pass and you will automatically receive an email containing a unique promo code. Enter the code while purchasing tickets on the Peabody Essex Museum website.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
source_phrases: This physical pass may be picked up at the circulation desk the day before use and must be brought to the Salem Witch Museum in order to receive the discount. Please return this physical pass to the Billerica Public Library by 9am the next day. The pass may be returned to the outside drop box during off hours.

This pass admits up to 6 visitors at a discounted rate, $14.00 for  adults/seniors and $11.75 for children (3-14). Regular admission prices are $19.00 for adults, $17.50 for senior citizens, and $16.00 for children (3-14).
Tickets must be booked online on the day of your visit at salemwitchmuseum.com , using the discount code that is printed on the pass.
The Salem Witch Museum pass is unavailable during the month of October.
This pass is generously donated by the Salem Witch Museum.

passes.title: Seacoast Science Center
passes.benefit_text:
Admits two adults and children under 18 for free at 116 Trustees locations. The discount pass cannot be applied to special events.
  Advance reservations are suggested for Appleton Farms, Castle Hill on the Crane Estate, Crane Beach (weekdays), deCordova Museum, Fruitlands Museum, Mytoi, Naumkeag, Wasque, and World's End (weekdays).
   Advance reservations are required for Longpoint Wildlife Refuge, Crane Beach (weekends) and World's End (weekends). Reservations can be made at https://thetrustees.org/content/passes/ . When reserving tickets submit the promo code GOPASS to access the discounted admission fee. You must bring the paper coupon pass from the Billerica Public Library to the Trustees location to receive the discount.
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.

passes.title: Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
This digital pass provides free admission to the museum for up to 9 people. While advance tickets are not required at this time, please be sure to check the museum website for up to date details that will help you plan your visit. The USS Constitution ship is separate from the museum. 
This pass is generously sponsored by the USS Constitution Museum.

While advance tickets are not required at this time, please be sure to check the museum website for up to date details that will help you plan your visit. The USS Constitution ship is separate from the museum.
This pass is generously sponsored by the USS Constitution Museum.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This is a paper coupon pass that must be picked up at the library. The coupon pass admits up to 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child.  The discount pass covers general admission only and cannot be applied to special events.
The pass is accepted at both Franklin Park Zoo in Boston and Stone Zoo in Stoneham.
To receive the discount present the pass to the admissions booth when purchasing general admission tickets at the zoo. 
Library patrons should not purchase timed-entry tickets on the Zoo New England website. Tickets purchased online are not eligible for the discount.
This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.
